text:
Create a vertical banner background (3500x600 px, vertical orientation, ultra high resolution) with a refined celestial aesthetic inspired by divine skies and ethereal luxury.

The composition must be purely background — no text, no characters, no UI, no objects with narrative meaning — only an elaborately crafted atmospheric scene.

Style: angelic crystalline sky, soft heavenly clouds, luminous golden aura lines, marble textures, translucent gemstone shards, flowing organic shapes, elegant glowing curves, subtle light particles and soft volumetric light beams.

The design should feel divine, sophisticated, luxurious and serene — similar to a heavenly cinematic environment with polished gold, crystal refractions and marble stone textures.

The color transitions must flow vertically in wide, clean gradient sections from top to bottom in this exact order:
Gold → Blue → Green → Purple → Orange → Red → Light Blue (Celeste) → ending again in Gold.

Each color section should be broad and spacious, with generous vertical breathing room. Keep the central area of each section softer and more uniform, allowing open visual space. The transitions between colors must be extremely smooth, fluid and seamless — blending organically through soft atmospheric gradients, flowing golden aura lines and subtle crystalline light diffusion. Avoid abrupt separations; every transition should feel natural and celestial.

Each color section should maintain the same celestial aesthetic: soft clouds, glowing crystal formations, golden aura threads, smooth marble surfaces and radiant light streaks.

The top section should start slightly desaturated and soft, gradually becoming richer and more luminous toward the middle, then smoothly transitioning through the remaining colors with elegant blending.

Keep the overall tone refined and not overly saturated at the beginning. Avoid harsh contrasts. Use smooth gradients, delicate lighting transitions, and cohesive harmony across all sections.

Add subtle crystalline highlights, gold filigree-like light lines, and organic flowing energy ribbons connecting the sections vertically.

Lighting: soft heavenly glow, volumetric light rays, reflective gold accents, crystal refraction effects.

Texture detail: marble veining, polished gold surfaces, translucent gemstones, soft mist layers.

Atmosphere: sacred, celestial, refined, luxurious, ethereal, futuristic divine design.

Ultra detailed, 8K resolution, cinematic lighting, hyper realistic materials, high dynamic range, soft depth, elegant composition.
I'll create this ultra high-resolution vertical celestial banner with the refined divine aesthetic and smooth color transitions you've described.

Create a horizontal decorative illuminated frame design (1281x553 px, ultra high resolution).

The composition must contain NO background — fully transparent background. Only the border lines and luminous decorative elements should be visible.

Style: refined celestial gold aesthetic, inspired by divine skies and ethereal luxury.

Design elegant organic frame borders flowing around the edges of the canvas. The lines should feel fluid, sacred and harmonious — not geometric or rigid.

Visual characteristics:
• Luminous golden aura lines
• Soft glowing filigree curves
• Subtle crystalline highlights
• Marble-inspired flowing line accents
• Delicate volumetric light glow
• Slight gemstone-like refractions within thicker curves
• Ethereal energy ribbons weaving along the border

The frame should feel handcrafted, divine and sophisticated — like celestial calligraphy made of light and polished gold.

Keep the center completely empty and transparent.
Do not fill the interior with any gradients, clouds or textures.
No background color. No shadows outside the lines.

The illumination should be soft yet radiant, with subtle bloom and refined glow — avoid harsh neon effects.

The corners may feature slightly richer ornamental flourishes, while the side borders remain elegant and flowing.

The gold tone should feel polished and luminous, slightly warm but not oversaturated.

Overall mood: sacred, luxurious, ethereal, celestial refinement.

Ultra detailed, high dynamic range, smooth glow transitions, elegant light diffusion, hyper realistic polished gold material, soft cinematic lighting.
I'll create this elegant horizontal illuminated frame with transparent background and refined celestial gold aesthetic.

[@image:#1:image][@image:#2:image][@image:#3:image][@image:#4:image][@image:#5:image][@image:#6:image] combine these posters into a cool carousel section to show that we have created lots of examples of operating systems for different people. This will end up being an animated website section, so really think outside the box in terms of how we present these posters in an interactive way.
I'll analyze these operating system posters first to understand their design and create an innovative interactive carousel section.

artifact.description:
**Visual Style:** 3D rendered, whimsical, and ethereal with a clean, modern aesthetic. Features glowing, transparent elements (ATM, money tubes) set against a backdrop of clouds and a bright sky. The color palette is light and aspirational, dominated by blues, whites, and gold accents.

**Themes:** Financial innovation, wealth generation, digital productivity, magical ease of financial transactions, and future-forward infrastructure. Emphasizes transparency and multiplicative growth.

**Content Focus:** A central transparent ATM in a cloud environment acts as the core of "PIXEL'S ATM OS". An intelligent, bespectacled chameleon mascot oversees the system. Money visibly flows through clear tubes and out of the ATM, symbolizing investment, digital multiplication, and withdrawal. Three key functions/benefits are highlighted in floating glass bubbles: "Make an Investment", "Digital Multiplication", and "Withdraw Funds". Wooden mannequins at the bottom represent users experiencing the positive outcome of financial abundance.

**Layout and Relationship between Elements:** The ATM is centrally positioned. The chameleon mascot is placed above and to the right, overseeing the system. Money flows into the ATM from the left and out to the right and bottom, creating a visual loop of financial process. Informational bubbles are strategically placed around the ATM, linking directly to its functions. The user figures below react to the money, connecting the system's output to user benefit. The overall composition suggests an integrated, aspirational financial ecosystem.

**Visual Style:** Dark background, contrasting glowing lines and particles in golden/amber and blue/cyan. Features a futuristic, ethereal, and somewhat artistic digital aesthetic.
**Theme:** Innovation, creation, reimagining reality, digital artistry, and harmonic interaction. The robotic hands interacting with the glowing harp suggest a blend of technology and artistic expression or intuitive control.
**Content:** The central element is a glowing, stylized harp composed of light lines and particles, played by segmented, wooden robotic hands. Text includes "Reality. Reimagined." at the top and "REVEAL: MARCH 15, 2026" at the bottom, indicating a future-oriented conceptual reveal.

**Visual Style:** The poster features a realistic rendering with a blend of classic elegance (orchestral setting, conductor attire, automaton aesthetic) and futuristic technology (holographic interfaces, glowing musical notes). It uses a warm, golden spotlight on the central figure, contrasting with cool blue digital elements, creating a dramatic and sophisticated atmosphere.

**Themes:** The primary themes are orchestration, control, and harmonious complexity. The conductor metaphor symbolizes the operating system's role in managing and coordinating diverse components. The integration of music notes and holographic data suggests a system that brings order and efficiency to complex technological processes, hinting at a foundational and transformative "kernel."

**Content:** The central element is a wooden automaton-like conductor holding a baton, positioned in an orchestral hall. Surrounding the conductor are glowing musical notes and multiple translucent blue holographic windows displaying various data, graphs, and abstract technological interfaces. The title "ORCHESTRAL OPERATING System" and tagline "The Kernel of a New Reality" are prominently displayed.

**Layout and Relationship:** The conductor is centrally placed, actively engaging with both the musical notes and the holographic data, visually representing the OS as the orchestrator. The musical elements arc around the conductor's head, while the digital interfaces appear to emanate from their presence, illustrating direct control and information management. The orchestral background sets a grand, organized stage for the system's operation.

**Visual Style:** Sci-fi fantasy and cosmic opera aesthetic, characterized by vibrant glowing elements, deep space backgrounds with galaxies and black holes, and holographic architectural outlines. The style is highly detailed and digitally rendered, conveying grandeur and futuristic elegance.

**Themes:** Orchestration, harmony, universal scope, control, power, and complexity. The "Orquesta Bichota Operating System" title positions the OS as a powerful, coordinated entity.

**Content and Layout:**
*   **Central Figure:** A female conductor, strikingly illuminated, stands on a glowing, crystalline platform, commanding a diverse orchestra. She acts as the central point of control and energy.
*   **Orchestra Elements:** Wooden mannequin-like figures play classical string and brass instruments, forming a traditional orchestra. Simultaneously, glowing, translucent outlines of modern instruments (saxophone, guitar, drums, trumpet) float in the cosmic background, suggesting integration of diverse musical forms.
*   **Background Elements:** Holographic outlines of both modern skyscrapers and classical government buildings (resembling the US Capitol) are interspersed with cosmic phenomena like galaxies and black holes, representing a system that spans different domains and scales.
*   **Interactive Elements (Implied):** Swirling musical notes and glowing energy trails flow dynamically around the conductor and orchestra, connecting different parts of the scene and suggesting active processes or data flow.
*   **Text:** "ORQUESTA BICHOTA OPERATING SYSTEM" in prominent gold and light blue, indicating the product. "LA GRAN ACTUACIÓN FINALE" (The Grand Final Performance) at the bottom reinforces the artistic, performance-oriented theme.

**Relationship between Elements:** The conductor unifies the diverse musical, architectural, and cosmic elements, symbolizing an operating system that orchestrates various components and functionalities into a cohesive and powerful performance across a vast, complex environment. The combination of classical and modern, tangible and holographic, suggests a system that bridges different eras, technologies, and applications.

**Visual Style:** Monochromatic with a black background, featuring white/light gray pixelated text and glowing, particle-based visualizations. The aesthetic is digital, futuristic, and emphasizes data flow and structured transformation through geometric forms (cubes, icosahedron, sphere) and network diagrams.

**Themes:** The central theme is the evolution from "FRAGMENTED TO UNIFIED." It showcases a "BEFORE" state of numerous disparate applications and a "AFTER" state of consolidated, evolved functionalities within a central operating system or platform ("AleOS" / "LOGO ROBIN"). Concepts of "Consolidation" and "Evolution" are explicitly highlighted.

**Content and Layout:**
*   **Top:** "AleOS" title in a pixelated font.
*   **Mid-Left ("BEFORE"):** A dense network of approximately 30 small, 3D cube icons representing various common applications (e.g., Photoshop, AI, email, VS Code, Spotify, WordPress). These cubes are interconnected by a chaotic web of dotted lines, symbolizing fragmentation.
*   **Mid-Center:** Particle streams emerge from the "BEFORE" applications, converging into two distinct pathways labeled "CONSOLIDATION" and "EVOLUTION."
*   **Mid-Right ("AFTER"):** These streams lead to a central circular element labeled "LOGO ROBIN." Surrounding "LOGO ROBIN" are six larger, unified, and symbolic concepts connected by dotted lines:
    1.  A glowing cube with a subtle face (representing identity or core processing).
    2.  Musical notes and paintbrushes (creativity, media).
    3.  A brain (intelligence, AI, cognition).
    4.  An icosahedron with data visualization (complex data, analytics, enterprise).
    5.  Buildings (business, infrastructure).
    6.  A glowing sphere (global reach, fundamental element).
    This arrangement depicts a centralized, integrated system.
*   **Bottom:** Tagline "FROM FRAGMENTED TO UNIFIED" in a pixelated font.

**Relationship between elements:** The left side illustrates a complex, scattered array of individual applications, which are then processed and transformed (consolidated and evolved) into fewer, broader, and integrated conceptual domains on the right, all stemming from and revolving around a central core operating system/platform. The visual flow from left to right clearly demonstrates this progression and unification.

**Visual Style:** Hybrid digital illustration with a vibrant, glowing aesthetic. The composition is layered, moving from detailed, character-rich fantastical scenes at the top to a globally connected, data-infused futuristic landscape in the middle, culminating in heroic, future-facing characters at the bottom.
**Themes:** Emphasizes imagination, the unifying power of fiction, creativity, technological innovation, and the exploration of future possibilities through both established narratives and emerging digital paradigms ("Procedural Futures," "Generative Futures").
**Content:** Displays a diverse array of iconic fictional characters and creators (Walt Disney, Roger Rabbit, Transformers, Willy Wonka, Mario, Luigi, Sonic, Tails), alongside conceptual future environments, global network representations, and speculative technology interfaces ("Wonkavision Future Simulator").
**Relationship between Elements:** The top section represents the historical and creative origins of fiction. This connects via ethereal clouds and light beams to the central global digital network, which branches into "Procedural Futures" and "Generative Futures." The bottom characters, facing forward, symbolize active engagement and exploration of these digital futures, drawing from the inspiration above.

text: Perfect! Now I'll create an innovative 3D carousel website section that showcases these diverse operating system posters in an interactive, dynamic way. I'll design it with a perspective-based layout that feels immersive and modern.

artifact.description: Generated from HTML: Operating Systems Showcase Carousel

text:
Perfect! I've created an innovative **3D Perspective Carousel** section that showcases all 6 operating system posters in a premium, interactive layout. 

**Key Features:**
✨ **3D Arc Formation** - Cards arranged in perspective depth with the center poster prominent and side cards scaled/rotated
🎯 **Interactive Navigation** - Click any card to bring it center, use arrow buttons, or click navigation dots
🌊 **Smooth Animations** - Auto-rotates every 4 seconds with elegant transitions
💎 **Glassmorphism Effects** - Modern frosted glass aesthetic on inactive cards
🌌 **Animated Background** - Dark gradient with floating particles for futuristic feel
📱 **Fully Responsive** - Adapts beautifully from desktop 3D arc to mobile vertical stack

The carousel creates an immersive showcase that highlights the diversity of OS designs—from financial systems to artistic interfaces to cosmic orchestration themes. The perspective-based presentation makes it feel like exploring a gallery of possibilities!

[@image:#1:image][@image:#2:image][@image:#3:image][@image:#4:image][@image:#5:image][@image:#6:image][@image:#7:image][@image:#8:image] please redo all these 10 images in the same graphic style, conserving the aesthetics of the pixel development.
I'll analyze all 8 images first to understand their content and the pixel development aesthetic, then recreate them in a unified graphic style.

artifact.description:
**Content:**
The image features a central transparent ATM machine situated within a cloud environment under a bright sky. A thoughtful, bespectacled chameleon character sits atop a cloud to the ATM's right. A transparent pipe on the left channels golden coins and banknotes towards the ATM. Money (banknotes and coins) also spills out from the ATM's dispenser, accumulating at its base. Several wooden mannequin figures with raised arms are positioned around the accumulating money. Three translucent UI boxes with icons and text are distributed around the ATM: "MAKE AN INVESTMENT" (top-left), "DIGITAL MULTIPLICATION" (top-right), and "WITHDRAW FUNDS" (bottom-right). The ATM screen displays options: DEPOSIT, WITHDRAW, BALANCE, TRANSFER, along with a graphic of glowing cubes. Text overlays include "PIXEL'S ATM OS," "Where Money Becomes Productive Capital," "The Future of Financial Infrastructure," and "Transparent • Magical • Multiplicative."

**Themes:**
Financial technology, investment growth, digital currency management, abundance, transparency, and a magical/futuristic financial system.

**Visual Elements:**
3D rendered style with soft, ethereal lighting and reflective surfaces. Dominant colors are sky blue, white/grey clouds, gold/yellow for money, and green for the chameleon. The composition places the ATM centrally, with supporting elements (chameleon, pipe, UI boxes, wooden figures) surrounding it, creating a sense of an integrated, conceptual system. UI elements are presented as glowing, translucent panels with simple, symbolic icons.

**Content:** The central image features a stylized harp, rendered with glowing blue and gold lines and particles, being played by two wooden mannequin hands, also illuminated with glowing particles. Text includes "Reality. Reimagined." at the top and "REVEAL: MARCH 15, 2026" at the bottom. The background is a dark, blurry theatrical setting with spotlights.

**Themes:** The core themes are innovation, transformation, and artistic creation in a digital or reimagined context, suggesting a blend of artificial intelligence/digital interaction (glowing lines, mannequin hands) and artistic expression (harp, music). The tagline "Reality. Reimagined." reinforces this concept.

**Visual Elements:**
*   **Color Palette:** Dominated by a dark background, contrasted with vibrant, glowing blues (cyan) and gold/orange for the main visual elements. Small, bright point lights (particles) add to the ethereal effect.
*   **Lighting:** The main subject is self-illuminated with glowing lines and particles, creating high contrast against the dark background. Subtle spotlights are visible in the blurred background.
*   **Composition:** The harp and hands are centrally positioned, drawing immediate focus. Text elements are symmetrically placed above and below the main graphic.
*   **Style:** Blends realistic human-like hands and the basic form of a harp with abstract, flowing, luminous digital lines and particle effects. It evokes a futuristic, ethereal, and sophisticated aesthetic.
*   **Typography:** Elegant, golden-colored serif font for all text.
*   **Texture:** The wooden hands show some joint details, while the glowing harp and energy are smooth and luminous. The background is soft-focused.

**Relationship between Elements:** The wooden hands interact directly with the glowing harp, which is depicted as a source of intricate, flowing energy lines and particles. This interaction visually represents the "reimagining" concept, where physical input generates abstract digital output or experience. The text frames this visual, providing thematic context and an announcement.

**Content:** A wooden mannequin figure, dressed in formal attire resembling a conductor, stands on a stage within an ornate theater or opera house. The figure holds a conductor's baton in its right hand and has its left arm raised. Surrounding the figure are floating, translucent holographic elements, including musical notes forming an arc and various data visualizations (graphs, charts, system interfaces).

**Themes:** The image combines themes of traditional artistry (orchestra, conductor, theater, classic wooden automaton aesthetic) with modern technology (operating system, holographic interfaces, data visualization). It suggests control, orchestration, and the harmonious integration of complex systems.

**Visual Elements:**
*   **Central Figure:** Wooden automaton/mannequin, detailed with visible joints and wood grain, dressed in a dark suit with a waistcoat and tie.
*   **Background:** Blurry, warm-toned theater interior (balconies, seating) lit by a dramatic spotlight from above.
*   **Foreground/Interaction:** Holographic musical notes (gold/yellow glow) and blue/cyan UI elements (graphs, data screens) appearing to be manipulated or conducted by the figure.
*   **Color Palette:** Dominant warm golds and browns for the figure and background, contrasting with glowing cool blues and cyans for the holographic elements.
*   **Lighting:** Dramatic spotlight illuminating the central figure, creating strong highlights and shadows. Holographic elements emit a soft glow.
*   **Typography:**
    *   Main title "ORCHESTRAL OPERATING System" in a large, elegant serif font with a metallic/gold texture, positioned at the top.
    *   Subtitle "The Kernel of a New Reality" in a smaller, italicized serif font with a gold/yellow color, positioned at the bottom.

**Image Analysis:**

The image features an ornate theatre stage with a classical orchestra composed of wooden artist's mannequins. A central mannequin conductor, facing away from the viewer, directs the orchestra with a glowing baton from which luminous musical notes and swirling energy emanate upwards and across the stage.

**Content:**
*   **Top Section:** Gold-colored text "ORCHESTRAL OPERATING SYSTEM" and tagline "Where Music Becomes Reality" set against dark, spotlighted red velvet curtains and an ornate golden proscenium arch.
*   **Mid Section:**
    *   **Conductor:** Wooden artist's mannequin on a podium, holding a glowing baton.
    *   **Orchestra:** Multiple wooden artist's mannequins playing string instruments (violins, cellos, double bass) and other orchestral instruments, seated with music stands.
    *   **Stage Background:** Dark red curtains, gilded walls, illuminated by a spotlight from above.
    *   **Digital/Futuristic Elements:** Glowing, multi-colored swirling galaxies/orbs placed among the orchestra members; a golden, glowing digital clock face; and a golden, wireframe structure resembling scaffolding or a crane in the background.
    *   **Musical Notation:** Luminous musical staff and notes flowing from the conductor's baton above the orchestra.
*   **Bottom Section:** White text slogan "Experience the future of spatial computing" and website "www.orchestral-os.com".

**Themes:**
*   **Integration of Music and Technology:** Classical orchestral performance infused with abstract digital and futuristic elements.
*   **Systemic Control and Harmony:** The conductor represents an operating system managing complex processes (the orchestra and digital elements).
*   **Reality from Abstraction:** Music (abstract art) manifesting as a tangible "operating system" and "spatial computing."

**Visual Elements & Relationships:**
*   The conductor's glowing baton serves as the focal point, visually generating the musical notes and connecting to the performance.
*   The wooden mannequins provide a distinct, stylized representation of human musicians, grounding the scene in a familiar yet artificial aesthetic.
*   The glowing digital elements are interspersed within the classical setting, creating a contrast and suggesting a blend of realities.
*   The overall lighting is dramatic, with a central spotlight illuminating the main performance area, while the background recedes into shadow.
*   The golden text and stage decor unify the ornate, classical aspect, contrasting with the vibrant glows of the digital effects.

**Content:** A central female conductor figure in an ornate dress stands on a glowing, faceted platform, leading an orchestra composed of wooden art mannequins playing various instruments (violins, cellos, flute, trumpet, drum set, guitar, saxophone). Musical notes and staves glow and swirl around them. The background is a cosmic scene with galaxies, nebulae, and two prominent swirling blue/purple vortexes. Stylized, glowing architectural outlines of skyscrapers and a Capitol-like building are present on either side. Text "ORQUESTA BICHOTA OPERATING SYSTEM" is at the top, and "LA GRAN ACTUACIÓN FINALE" is at the bottom.

**Themes:** Grand orchestral performance, cosmic scale, digital/operating system control, futuristic artistry, and dramatic spectacle.

**Visual Elements:**
*   **Color Palette:** Dominated by deep blues and purples of space, contrasted with golden yellows for text and musical elements, and bright white/light blue for light sources and digital outlines. Pink for the conductor's hair.
*   **Lighting:** Strong central vertical light beam illuminating the conductor, ethereal glows emanating from musical notes, instruments, and architectural elements. Cosmic light streaks.
*   **Composition:** Centralized conductor as the focal point, with orchestral elements arranged in a circular formation around her. Background elements frame the scene. Text at top and bottom.
*   **Style:** Mix of realistic rendering for the conductor and cosmic background, with stylized glowing outlines for instruments and buildings. Musical notes are represented as glowing trails.
